Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Edward A. Misleh, Esq. of the Law Offices of Edward A. Misleh PC, T:916.443.1267, for plaintiff/moving party, by Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF LAURI PONZELLI'S Motion For Order Permitting A First Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Ms. Ponzelli is granted leave to file her proposed first amended complaint by February 9, 2018.
